1: Consider it all joy, my brothers, when you fall into various trials,
Knowing that the proving of your faith produces endurance.
2: For just as the body without the spirit is dead, so also faith without works is dead.
4: God resists the proud, but gives grace to the humble.
5: The petition of a righteous man avails much in its working.

21.text: The word of God is not just for information; it is a seed implanted into our souls that has the power to save our souls from the world and self.

6.text: Grace is not just a blessing; it is God Himself being enjoyed by us. Humility is the primary condition for receiving and enjoying this grace.
